title: Google to pay SpaceX $920 million a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
summary_full: Ahead of a planned IPO, SpaceX inked a deal to rent compute capacity to Google for $920 million per month for 32 months.
summary_public: Ahead of a planned IPO, SpaceX inked a deal to rent compute capacity to Google for $920 million per month for 32 months.
